name: truvera-mcp-service
description: MCP service for Truvera API integration with Docker support

scripts.docker:build: cd ../.. && docker build --build-arg BUILD_NUMBER="$(cat apps/truvera-api/.buildnumber)" -t truvera-api-mcp:latest -t truvera-api-mcp:$(cat apps/truvera-api/.buildnumber) -f apps/truvera-api/Dockerfile .
scripts.docker:run: docker rm -f truvera-api-mcp || true && docker run -d --name truvera-api-mcp --env-file ./.env -e MCP_MODE=http -e MCP_PORT=3000 -p 3000:3000 truvera-api-mcp:latest
